title: derris rubrocalyx subsp. rubrocalyx
intro: Derris rubrocalyx subsp. rubrocalyx, also known as the 'Red Calyx Derris', is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rotenone content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, skin infections, and digestive issues, among others. The herbal preparations of Derris rubrocalyx subsp. rubrocalyx include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
